meta.title: 道德相对主义与普遍伦理
meta.description: Native-level philosophical discourse on moral relativism vs universal ethics in Chinese: idioms, classical rhetorical negation, formal grammar.
meta.description_ko: 원어민 수준의 도덕 상대주의·보편 윤리 철학 담화: 성어, 고전적 반어 부정, 격식체 문형.

explanation.en: 「道德相对主义」(dàodé xiāngduì zhǔyì) means "moral relativism", the view that moral standards vary across cultures/contexts.
explanation.ko: 「道德相对主义」(dàodé xiāngduì zhǔyì)는 도덕적 기준이 문화·맥락에 따라 상대적이라는 관점을 뜻한다.

questions.prompt: 「道德相对主义」是什么意思？(What does 道德相对主义 mean?)

explanation.en: 「普世价值」(pǔshì jiàzhí) means "universal values", believed to transcend cultural boundaries and apply to all humanity.
explanation.ko: 「普世价值」(pǔshì jiàzhí)는 모든 인류에게 적용되며 문화를 초월한다고 여겨지는 '보편적 가치'를 뜻한다.

questions.prompt: 「普世价值」是什么意思？(What does 普世价值 mean?)
choices: 被认为适用于全人类、超越文化界限的共同价值(values believed to apply to all humanity, transcending cultural boundaries)

explanation.en: In moral discussions, this idiom illustrates the view that moral norms should be sensitive to local cultural contexts.
explanation.ko: 도덕적 논의에서 이 성어는 도덕 규범이 현지 문화적 맥락을 존중해야 한다는 관점을 설명한다.

questions.prompt: 「入乡随俗」在道德讨论中常用来说明什么？(What is 入乡随俗 often used to illustrate in moral discussions?)
choices: 道德标准是绝对不变的
任何行为都应该被无条件接受
道德规范应尊重当地文化差异(moral norms should respect local cultural differences)

explanation.en: 「见仁见智」is an idiom meaning "different people may see the same matter differently", i.e., there being no single objective answer.
explanation.ko: 「见仁见智」는 '같은 사안을 두고도 사람마다 견해가 다를 수 있다'는 뜻의 성어이다.

questions.prompt: 「见仁见智」是什么意思？(What does 见仁见智 mean?)
choices: 必须达成完全一致的看法
对同一件事，不同的人可能有不同的看法(different people may have different views on the same matter)

explanation.en: 「伦理困境」(lúnlǐ kùnjìng) means "ethical dilemma", a situation where moral principles conflict.
explanation.ko: 「伦理困境」(lúnlǐ kùnjìng)는 도덕적 원칙이 충돌하는 상황, 즉 '윤리적 딜레마'를 뜻한다.

questions.prompt: 「伦理困境」是什么意思？(What does 伦理困境 mean?)

explanation.en: 「道德相对主义」means "moral relativism".
explanation.ko: 「道德相对主义」는 '도덕적 상대주义'를 뜻한다.

questions.prompt: 持___立场的学者认为，道德标准因文化、历史背景的不同而各异，并无放之四海而皆准的统一标准。(Scholars who hold the position of moral relativism believe that moral standards vary according to differing cultural and historical backgrounds, with no unified standard applicable universally.)

explanation.en: 「普世价值」means "universal values".
explanation.ko: 「普世价值」는 '보편적 가치'를 뜻한다.

questions.prompt: 尽管文化背景各异，许多思想家依然坚信存在某些超越文化界限的___，例如对生命尊严的基本尊重。(Despite differing cultural backgrounds, many thinkers still firmly believe that certain universal values transcending cultural boundaries exist, such as basic respect for the dignity of life.)

explanation.en: This idiom is used to argue for respecting local cultural contexts in moral judgment.
explanation.ko: 이 성어는 도덕적 판단에서 현지 문화적 맥락을 존중해야 한다는 주장에 쓰인다.

questions.prompt: 有人认为，评判一种习俗是否合理，应该秉持___的原则，充分尊重当地的文化语境。(Some believe that judging whether a custom is reasonable should uphold the principle of "when in Rome, do as the Romans do," fully respecting the local cultural context.)
choices: 道德标准是绝对不变的
任何行为都应该被无条件接受

explanation.en: 「见仁见智」describes differing views on the same matter.
explanation.ko: 「见仁见智」는 같은 사안에 대한 견해 차이를 뜻한다.

questions.prompt: 关于安乐死是否符合道德，历来___，各方观点难以达成一致。(Regarding whether euthanasia is morally justified, opinions have always varied among different people, with all sides finding it hard to reach consensus.)
choices: 必须达成完全一致的看法

explanation.en: 「伦理困境」means "ethical dilemma".
explanation.ko: 「伦理困境」는 '윤리적 딜레마'를 뜻한다.

questions.prompt: 医生在面对资源有限而患者众多的情况时，常常陷入艰难的___之中。(When doctors face a situation with limited resources but many patients, they often fall into a difficult ethical dilemma.)

explanation.en: 「暴露」means "to expose".
explanation.ko: 「暴露」는 '드러내다'라는 뜻이다.

questions.prompt: 这场关于道德相对主义的辩论___了不同文化背景下伦理观念的深刻差异。(This debate about moral relativism exposed profound differences in ethical concepts across different cultural backgrounds.)

explanation.en: 「与其〜不如〜」means "rather than 〜, it's better to 〜".
explanation.ko: 「与其〜不如〜」는 '~하느니 차라리 ~하는 게 낫다'는 뜻이다.

questions.prompt: 与其固守单一文化视角下的道德标准，___不如以更加开放包容的姿态理解不同伦理体系的合理性。(Rather than rigidly adhering to moral standards from a single cultural perspective, it's better to understand the rationality of different ethical systems with a more open and inclusive attitude.)

explanation.en: 「即使〜也〜」means "even if 〜, still 〜".
explanation.ko: 「即使〜也〜」는 '설령 ~일지라도 ~하다'는 뜻이다.

questions.prompt: 这种伦理规范___在某些文化中被广泛接受，___在另一些文化背景下却可能引发强烈争议。(Even though this ethical norm is widely accepted in some cultures, it might still spark intense controversy in other cultural contexts.)

explanation.en: 「之所以〜是因为〜」emphasizes the reason.
explanation.ko: 「之所以〜是因为〜」는 이유를 강조한다.

questions.prompt: 道德相对主义之所以在学术界引发激烈争论，___是因为它直接挑战了普遍伦理标准存在的可能性。(The reason moral relativism has sparked intense debate in academia is precisely because it directly challenges the possibility of universal ethical standards existing.)

explanation.en: 「一旦〜就〜」means "once 〜, then 〜".
explanation.ko: 「一旦〜就〜」는 '일단 ~하면 곧 ~하다'는 뜻이다.

questions.prompt: 一个社会一旦完全否定普遍伦理标准的存在，___可能陷入道德虚无主义的危险境地。(Once a society completely denies the existence of universal ethical standards, it might fall into the dangerous predicament of moral nihilism.)

explanation.en: 「归根结底〜还是〜」emphasizes the fundamental point.
explanation.ko: 「归根结底〜还是〜」는 근본적인 요점을 강조한다.

questions.prompt: 归根结底，道德相对主义与普遍伦理的争论___在于如何平衡文化多样性与人类共通的道德底线。(In the final analysis, the debate between moral relativism and universal ethics still lies in how to balance cultural diversity with humanity's common moral bottom line.)

explanation.en: 「共同」means "jointly/together".
explanation.ko: 「共同」는 '함께'라는 뜻이다.

questions.prompt: 由此可见，文化语境与人类共通的良知___影响着我们对道德问题的判断。(From this we can see that both cultural context and humanity's common conscience jointly influence our judgment of moral issues.)

explanation.en: 「往往」means "often/frequently".
explanation.ko: 「往往」는 '흔히'라는 뜻이다.

questions.prompt: 众所周知，即使在同一文化内部，人们对某些道德议题___也可能持有截然不同的立场。(As everyone knows, even within the same culture, people often hold completely different stances on certain moral issues.)

explanation.en: 「岂〜」is a classical-style rhetorical negation.
explanation.ko: 「岂〜」는 고전적 반어 표현이다.

questions.prompt: 道德判断___全然取决于文化背景，人类共通的恻隐之心又岂能被完全抹杀？(Moral judgment is by no means entirely determined by cultural background — how could humanity's shared compassion be entirely erased?)

explanation.en: 「往往」means "often".
explanation.ko: 「往往」는 '흔히'라는 뜻이다.

questions.prompt: 尽管文化背景千差万别，人类对某些基本道德准则___达成了跨文化的共识。(Despite vastly different cultural backgrounds, humanity has often reached cross-cultural consensus on certain basic moral principles.)

explanation.en: 「不如」must come before the verb phrase 以更加开放包容的姿态理解〜: 不如以〜理解 (not 理解不如以〜).
explanation.ko: 「不如」는 동사구 '以更加开放包容的姿态理解〜' 앞에 와야 하므로 '不如以〜理解'가 맞다.

questions.prompt: 与其固守单一文化视角下的道德标准，理解不如以更加开放包容的姿态不同伦理体系的合理性。(Rather than rigidly adhering to moral standards from a single cultural perspective, it's better to understand the rationality of different ethical systems with a more open and inclusive attitude.) — find the error
choices: 与其固守单一文化视角下的道德标准，不如以更加开放包容的姿态理解不同伦理体系的合理性。
与其固守单一文化视角下的道德标准，理解不如以更加开放包容的姿态不同伦理体系的合理性。
与其固守单一文化视角下的道德标准，不如理解以更加开放包容的姿态不同伦理体系的合理性。
与其固守单一文化视角下的道德标准，以更加开放包容的姿态不如理解不同伦理体系的合理性。

explanation.en: The fixed pattern requires 是因为 in that order, not 因为是.
explanation.ko: 고정 문형은 '因为是'가 아니라 '是因为' 순서여야 한다.

questions.prompt: 道德相对主义之所以在学术界引发激烈争论，因为是它直接挑战了普遍伦理标准存在的可能性。(The reason moral relativism has sparked intense debate in academia is precisely because it directly challenges the possibility of universal ethical standards existing.) — find the error
choices: 道德相对主义之所以在学术界引发激烈争论，是因为它直接挑战了普遍伦理标准存在的可能性。
道德相对主义之所以在学术界引发激烈争论，因为是它直接挑战了普遍伦理标准存在的可能性。
道德相对主义之所以在学术界引发激烈争论，是它因为直接挑战了普遍伦理标准存在的可能性。
道德相对主义之所以在学术界引发激烈争论，它是因为直接挑战了普遍伦理标准存在的可能性。

explanation.en: 「一旦〜就〜」is the correct fixed pattern; 「才」does not match the immediate consequence implied by 一旦.
explanation.ko: 「一旦〜就〜」가 올바른 고정 문형이며 「才」는 '一旦'의 즉각적 결과와 맞지 않는다.

questions.prompt: 一个社会一旦完全否定普遍伦理标准的存在，可能才陷入道德虚无主义的危险境地。(Once a society completely denies the existence of universal ethical standards, it might fall into the dangerous predicament of moral nihilism.) — find the error
choices: 一个社会一旦完全否定普遍伦理标准的存在，就可能陷入道德虚无主义的危险境地。
一个社会一旦完全否定普遍伦理标准的存在，可能才陷入道德虚无主义的危险境地。
一个社会一旦完全否定普遍伦理标准的存在，才可能陷入道德虚无主义的危险境地。
一个社会一旦完全否定普遍伦理标准的存在，可能陷入才道德虚无主义的危险境地。

explanation.en: The sentence reads: 与其固守单一文化视角下的道德标准，不如以更加开放包容的姿态理解不同伦理体系的合理性 ("Rather than rigidly adhering to moral standards from a single cultural perspective, it's better to understand the rationality of different ethical systems with a more open and inclusive attitude").
explanation.ko: 문장은 '与其固守单一文化视角下的道德标准，不如以更加开放包容的姿态理解不同伦理体系的合理性' (단일 문화 관점의 도덕 기준을 고수하느니 차라리 더 개방적이고 포용적인 태도로 다른 윤리 체계의 합리성을 이해하는 게 낫다)가 된다.

questions.prompt: 与其固守单一文化视角下的道德标准，__________不同伦理体系的合理性。(Rather than rigidly adhering to moral standards from a single cultural perspective, it's better to understand the rationality of different ethical systems with a more open and inclusive attitude.)
words: 不如以更加开放包容的姿态理解
questions.answer: 不如以更加开放包容的姿态理解

explanation.en: The sentence reads: 一个社会一旦完全否定普遍伦理标准的存在，就可能陷入道德虚无主义的危险境地 ("Once a society completely denies the existence of universal ethical standards, it might fall into the dangerous predicament of moral nihilism").
explanation.ko: 문장은 '一个社会一旦完全否定普遍伦理标准的存在，就可能陷入道德虚无主义的危险境地' (사회는 일단 보편 윤리 기준의 존재를 완전히 부정하면 도덕적 허무주의라는 위험한 상황에 빠질 수 있다)가 된다.

questions.prompt: 一个社会一旦完全否定普遍伦理标准的存在，__________陷入道德虚无主义的危险境地。(Once a society completely denies the existence of universal ethical standards, it might fall into the dangerous predicament of moral nihilism.)
